Developer
Home Study Course
TIPS FOR PICKING A NICHE
1. You do NOT have to care about the niche you
pick.
2. Make sure you pick a niche that is HOT. You can do
this most simply by going to the store that sells
magazines. Stand in front of the magazine aisle
and there in front of your face should be no less
then 20 of the hottest niches! Any topic that has at
least 3 magazines about it is a VERY HOT niche.
3. Don't forget that most niches can also go
"horizontal." For example the weight loss niche has
all sorts of specific dieting plans that each can be
their own separate niche.
Step 	1:
Research
Tips For Picking A Domain Name
! Try to avoid dashes in your domain
name
! Pick out a .com domain
! Be sure that it has some sort of "Group"
appeal to it.
o 	For example - siteflipACADEMY,
juggernautCLUB, plrOASIS,
affiliateCLASSROOM ...all signal that
groups of people will be visiting this
site.
! Should also be a little sexy...meaning
you don’t want a domain name that's
like rubikscubesolution.com, but
rubiksmasterclass.com would be
! Be imaginative and creative
Step 	2: 	Buy
A 	Domain
There are many platforms for
building a site. The most common is
HTML coding, but many buyers are
looking for a Content Management
System.
For this you can use Joomla or
Wordpress. Another resource for
building sites is www.Weebly.com
Step 	3:
Build 	Your 	Site
Bonus System:
Site Flipping
The Developer’s Site Flip Flowchart:

-- 1 of 3 --

Investor
Home Study Course
Your first task is to build a team of employees
(or outsourcers) that will manager your sites for
you. You will need:
! 	Copywriter – to cover online ads
! 	Webmaster – to maintain the sites
! 	Graphics
! 	SEO
Step 	1:
Build 	A
Team
Research Tools:
1. freekeywords.worktracker.com
2. Quantcast.com
3. Google Trends
4. iWebTool
5. SEOpen Toolbar
6. WhoIs.DomainTools.com
7. Fake Page Rank Tool at:
http://www.seologs.com/pr-check/pagerank.html
*We cover how to use all of these in the
HSC videos – (Lesson 5, Disc 1)
Also ask the owner for proof of income,
traffic and any other claim they make. Be
sure there’s no inconsistencies in the
details (ie. No traffic, but loads of income)
Now search through the
marketplaces for available
sites.
! 	You’re looking for
sites already making
money.
! 	Once you’ve found
a site, research it!
Step 	2:
Research
Once you’ve researched a website and
decided that it is a good buy and that you
can build the value… BUY IT.
Step 	3: 	Buy
Bonus System:
Site Flipping
The Investor’s Site Flip Flowchart:

-- 2 of 3 --

Bonus System:
Site Flipping
The Marketer’s Site Flip Flowchart:
Marketer
Home Study Course
Your first task is to search through the
marketplaces for available sites.
! 	You’re looking for sites making nothing,
making little, or an extremely good deal
(a site making money, but seller is offering
for a great deal).
! 	Once you’ve found a site, research it!
Step 	1:
Research
Research Tools:
1. freekeywords.worktracker.com
2. Quantcast.com
3. Google Trends
4. iWebTool
5. SEOpen Toolbar
6. WhoIs.DomainTools.com
7. Fake Page Rank Tool at:
http://www.seologs.com/pr-check/pagerank.html
*We cover how to use all of these in the
HSC videos – (Lesson 5, Disc 1)
Once you’ve researched a
website and decided that it is
a good buy and that you can
build the value… BUY IT.
Step 	2:
Buy
Now that you’ve purchased a site it’s time
to start building the value of it. Here’s how
you do that:
" Traffic 	" Build A List
" Get Backlinks 	" Build A Community
" Monetize
Step 	3:
Build 	the
Value 	of
Your 	Site

-- 3 of 3 --
